description: Order of fruit (including lemons, apples, pomegranate, and rose lozenges) from the elder Abū l-Ḥasan, to be given to the bearer of the document. The verso contains seemingly unrelated accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Some of the items, e.g., "laymūn safarjalī," are similar to those on T-S AS 151.245 (PGPID 28989). As "quince-like lemon" does not make sense, it is probably implied that all of these are syrups (e.g., [sharāb] laymūn safarjalī).
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
